class Solution {

public:

    double new21Game(int n, int k, int maxPts) {

        if (k ==0) return 1.0; 

        vector<double> dp(k + maxPts +1, 0.0);

        int low =k;

        int upper = min(high, n); 

        if (upper < low) {

            window_sum =0.0; 

        } else {

            window_sum = upper - low +1; 

        }

        dp[k-1] = window_sum / maxPts

class Solution {

public:

    double new21Game(int n, int k, int maxPts) {

        if (k ==0) return 1.0; 

        vector<double> dp(k + maxPts +1, 0.0); 

        // For j >=k, dp[j] = 1 if j <=n else 0 

        // But we don't store all of them, compute on the fly 

        double window_sum; 

        // Compute initial window_sum for i =k-1 

        int low =k; 

        int high = (k-1) + maxPts; 

        int upper = min(high, n); 

        if (upper < low) {

            window_sum =0.0; 

        } else {

            window_sum = upper - low +1; 

        }

        dp[k-1] = window_sum / maxPts
